projects.name: Multithreaded HTTP/1.1 Server
projects.description: A lightweight HTTP server written in pure C with POSIX threads for concurrent connection handling. Features Apache Common Log Format logging, path traversal protection, keep-alive connections, and graceful error responses.

projects.name: Al-Moanes
projects.description: An Islamic Quran recitation web app with Arabic/English RTL/LTR support, custom audio player, sidebar navigation, smooth scroll, and newsletter subscription via Google Apps Script.

projects.name: University Management System
projects.description: A full-stack admin web application with a NoSQL database backend for managing university operations. Built as a final year project, graded 18.75/20 — top 10% of class.
